purpose: Local/static operator cockpit for CASULO Exocortex Foundation demo.

surfaces.name: Status Header
surfaces.purpose: Show phase, gate, readiness and blocked claims.

surfaces.name: Cockpit Chat
surfaces.purpose: Operator asks for state, diagnostic report, monitoring summary or simple solution options.

surfaces.name: Evidence Panel
surfaces.purpose: Show runtime context packet evidence refs and graph summary.

surfaces.name: Diagnostic Report Panel
surfaces.purpose: Show supported facts, gaps, risks, gate, allowed and blocked actions.

surfaces.name: Monitoring Panel
surfaces.purpose: Show current state, readiness, blocked claims, risk and follow-up.

surfaces.name: Boundary Panel
surfaces.purpose: Keep client, production and commercial claims blocked.
